register.title: Yakha i-akhawunti
register.subtitle: Faka imininingwane yakho ukuze uqalise
register.successMessage: Siyabonga ngokubhalisa. Ukuze wenze kusebenze i-akhawunti yakho, sicela uhlole i-imeyili yakho bese uchofoza isixhumanisi sokuqinisekisa esikuthumelele sona.
register.passwordTooShort: Iphasiwedi kufanele okungenani ibe nezinhlamvu eziyi-6

twoFactor.title: Ukuqinisekiswa kwezinto ezimbili
twoFactor.descriptionCode: Faka ikhodi enamadijithi ayi-6 kusuka kuhlelo lwakho lokusebenza lokuqinisekiswa
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Faka enye yamakhodi akho okutakula ukuze ungene ngemvume
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: Sicela ufake ikhodi yokutakula evumelekile (ifomethi: XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.helpText: Unenkinga? Xhumana nosizo ukuze uthole usizo.

setup.subtitle: Ake sikulungiselele. Sicela ukhethe uhlobo lwe-akhawunti yakho ukuze uqhubeke.
setup.clinicDescription: Ngimele umtholampilo wezokwelapha noma isikhungo sokunakekelwa kwezempilo esinodokotela abaningi
setup.labDescription: Ngimele i-laboratory yokuxilonga noma isikhungo sokuhlola
setup.setupError: Yehlulekile ukuqedela ukumiswa ngokumiswa. Sicela uzame futhi.

messages.errorFallback: Yehlulekile ukuthumela i-imeyili esetha kabusha. Sicela uzame futhi.

success.title: Hlola i-imeyili yakho
success.sentTo: Sithumele isixhumanisi sokusetha kabusha iphasiwedi ku- {{email}}
success.description: Sicela uhlole ibhokisi lakho lokungenayo bese ulandela imiyalelo ukusetha kabusha iphasiwedi yakho. Isixhumanisi siphela ngemuva kwehora eli-1.

form.title: Ukhohliwe iphasiwedi yakho?
form.description: Faka i-imeyili yakho futhi sizokuthumela isixhumanisi sokusetha kabusha.

messages.requirementsMissing: Sicela uhlangabezane nazo zonke izidingo zegama lokungena
messages.errorFallback: Yehlulekile ukusetha kabusha igama lokungena. Mhlawumbe isixhumanisi sesiphelelwe yisikhathi.

form.title: Setha kabusha igama lakho lokungena
form.description: Faka igama lakho lokungena elisha ngezansi.

messages.invalidLink: Isixhumanisi sokuqinisekiswa esingaqinisekisiwe. Sicela usebenzise isixhumanisi esivela ku-imeyili yakho.
messages.errorFallback: Yehlulekile ukuqinisekisa i-imeyili. Mhlawumbe isixhumanisi sesiphelelwe yisikhathi.

state.loadingDescription: Sicela ulinde ngenkathi siqinisekisa ikheli lakho le-imeyili.

success.nextStep: Manje usungangena ngemvume ku-akhawunti yakho nge-imeyili nephasiwedi.

error.helpText: Uma lokhu kuqhubeka, thintana nosizo noma ubhalise futhi.
